creator: tilman@arved.de
text:
[CCed to devel/ORBacus Maintainer]

Do we really need 2 ORBacus Ports in the Portstree?

The devel/ORBacus Port is quite out of date
- It isn't at the latest release of the 3.x 
- It uses the old OMG CORBA 2.0 specification (dated 1997),
which has, AFAI am into the CORBAstuff, a lot of disadvantages against
the actual 2.4 specification.

IMHO nobody would start to develop an application based on this ORB now
adays. I
I think this PR can be used to update the devel/ORBacus port.

regards
arved
